infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera for scanning medical documents and QR codes
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app uses photo library for uploading medical documents

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Healthcare Mobile to access your camera for scanning medical documents and QR codes.
